name: Neon Fern Garden
description: Procedurally generated fern fronds unfurling in neon colors against dark soil. Bass drives growth animation, mids control frond density, treble creates dewdrop sparkles. Mouse attracts or repels frond tips.

params.name: Growth Speed
params.description: Speed of fern unfurling growth animation

params.name: Frond Density
params.description: Number of fern fronds in the garden

params.name: Dew Amount
params.description: Amount of dewdrop sparkles on fronds

params.name: Mouse Influence
params.description: Attract or repel frond tips with mouse
